content.claim: No discrete legislative or ministerial proposal specifically targeting the structural existence of 6- or 8-year gimnázium tracks was identified in recent public search results (Eurydice 2024–2026 national reform reports, pending 2026 parliamentary education reforms); recent reform activity focuses instead on teacher careers, salaries, assessment systems, and vocational pathways.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Equity and social mobility lens
limitations: Absence of evidence in public search results, not evidence of absence
May reflect gap in English-language or online-indexed sources rather than absence of Hungarian-language debate
Does not confirm absence of legislative activity, only absence of detected current proposals in available search results
Open research gap requiring Hungarian-language primary-source searching to confirm
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
